ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "curator" TEXT /* Name of the curator responsible for the study */,
  "PMID" INTEGER /* PubMed ID of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source of the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the sample belongs to */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the sample belongs to */,
  "body_site" TEXT /* Body site from which the sample was taken (e.g., stool, blood) */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., fecal, blood) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "storage_condition" TEXT /* Storage conditions of the sample */,
  "sample_volume" REAL /* Volume of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the subject belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "age_category" TEXT /* Age category of the subject (e.g., adult, child) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject (e.g., male, female) */,
  "BMI" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the subject */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the subject */,
  "non_westernized" TEXT /* Whether the subject is from a non-westernized population */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the subject */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the subject */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_data" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the subject belongs to */,
  "disease" TEXT /* Disease diagnosis (if any) */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment given (if any) */,
  "cholesterol" REAL /* Cholesterol level of the subject */,
  "c_peptide" REAL /* C-peptide level of the subject */,
  "dyastolic_p" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure of the subject */,
  "systolic_p" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure of the subject */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the subject */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies of the subject */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Medications the subject is currently taking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequencing_data" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the sample belongs to */,
  "sequencing_platform" TEXT /* Sequencing platform used (e.g., IlluminaHiSeq) */,
  "number_reads" INTEGER /* Number of reads in the sequencing data */,
  "number_bases" INTEGER /* Total number of bases in the sequencing data */,
  "minimum_read_length" INTEGER /* Minimum read length in the sequencing data */,
  "median_read_length" INTEGER /* Median read length in the sequencing data */,
  "NCBI_accession" TEXT /* NCBI accession number of the sequencing data */,
  "sequencing_center" TEXT /* Center where the sequencing was performed */,
  "sequencing_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequencing was performed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the sequencing data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being modified */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the modification */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the modification was made */,
  "modification_type" TEXT /* Type of modification (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the modification */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the modification was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the role */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role having the permission */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the permission applies to */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the permission applies to */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, download, update) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the permission */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_samples" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_subjects" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id", "subject_id")
)
